name: Tree
examineText: A broad village tree, rough-barked and heavy with branches. It should yield plain logs.

name: Oak Tree
examineText: A stout oak with a thick trunk and stubborn grain. Good wood for stronger bows and boards.

name: Copper Rock
examineText: A copper-veined rock ready to be mined.

name: Iron Rock
examineText: An iron-rich rock. A pickaxe should loosen the ore.

name: Fishing Spot
examineText: A good spot to cast a line.

name: Furnace
examineText: A hot furnace for smelting ore into metal bars.

name: Cooking Range
examineText: A cooking range with enough heat for a proper meal.

name: Altar
examineText: A sacred altar. It hums faintly with old power.

name: Willow Tree
examineText: A willow tree trailing soft green branches. Its flexible wood is prized by careful fletchers.

name: Dead Tree
examineText: A dead tree, grey and splintered. The dry branches look ready to snap under an axe.

name: Tin Rock
examineText: A pale rock with tin ore running through it.

name: Coal Rock
examineText: A dark coal rock. Useful fuel, if you can mine it.

name: Maple Tree
examineText: A maple with a warm-coloured trunk and close, clean grain. The logs should carve neatly.

name: Yew Tree
examineText: An old yew with dark needles and dense heartwood. A patient woodcutter could make something fine from it.

name: Door
examineText: A door. It separates here from there.

name: Cave Entrance
examineText: A cave entrance leading into the unknown.

name: Mithril Rock
examineText: A mithril-veined rock. It looks hard to mine.

name: Anvil
examineText: A heavy anvil scarred by years of hammer blows.

name: Wooden Chest
examineText: A simple wooden chest with a stubborn lock.

name: Iron Chest
examineText: An iron-bound chest. It looks harder to crack.

name: Black Bronze Chest
examineText: A black bronze chest with a serious-looking lock.

name: Mithril Chest
examineText: A mithril chest. The lock looks expensive and unfriendly.

name: Steel Chest
examineText: A steel chest built to keep valuables where they are.

name: Royal Gold Chest
examineText: A royal gold chest. Whoever locked it expected trouble.

name: Rice Plant
examineText: Slender rice stalks hang heavy with pale grains. Harvest them gently before the field scatters.

name: Ladder
examineText: A ladder connecting one level to another.

name: Obelisk
examineText: A dark obelisk waiting for a suitable offering.

name: Silver Rock
examineText: A silver-veined rock with a pale metallic shine.

name: Paper
examineText: A loose sheet of paper. Someone thought it was worth leaving here.

name: Well
examineText: A well with water below. The stones are worn smooth.

name: Potato Plant
examineText: A low potato plant with healthy leaves. The useful part is hidden in the soil below.

name: Cauliflower Plant
examineText: Broad leaves cradle a pale cauliflower head. It looks ready to pull before it toughens.

name: Wheat Plant
examineText: A small stand of ripe wheat, dry and golden at the tips. It should thresh into useful grain.

name: Bank booth
examineText: A bank booth for speaking with the banker safely across the counter.

name: Pottery Wheel
examineText: A pottery wheel for shaping soft clay.

name: Clay Rock
examineText: A clay rock. Soft enough to mine, useful enough to keep.

name: Kiln
examineText: A kiln for firing shaped clay into finished pottery.

name: Spinning Wheel
examineText: A spinning wheel for twisting fibres into useful cord.

name: Crimsonite Rock
examineText: A crimsonite rock with deep red mineral seams.

name: Malachite Rock
examineText: A malachite rock marked by green mineral veins.

name: Stairs
examineText: Stone steps leading between levels.

name: Sulphur Rock
examineText: A sulphur-stained rock with a sharp mineral smell.

name: Scenery
examineText: A piece of scenery placed to make the world feel lived in.
